posts.author: anniemal (Annie Carney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The option to purchase an a-la-carte subscription to the WorkFlow tool on any monday.com plan.

What are you trying to achieve

My current client is a small, local business, with budget constraints. Therefore, they only want to pay for the Pro plan, which works for most of their needs, but the one tool I find I’m missing from Enterprise is the Workflow tool. I’d love to be able to add it on to the Pro plan without upgrading to Enterprise for clients like this.

posts.author: Tom-CXmonday (Tom)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Annie, Tom from monday. I’m glad to let you know that the WorkFlow builder has been added to the Pro plan You can have up to 5 active workflows at a time, and if you need more, you can purchase an add-on of 20 more, adding up to a total limit of up to 25 active workflows.

posts.author: botsquad (Patrick Fallon)
posts.cookedHtml: What is the cost for the add-on of 20 additional Workflows please?

posts.author: Tom-CXmonday (Tom)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Patrick - it’s best to reach out to our billing team for a percise answer Open a new chat by clicking the “Chat with us” button in your account and ask for the billing team, they’ll answer you right away!
